items.summary: 本周FedEx和零售名牌如Lululemon和Macy的财报将公布，我们可能会听到更多关于消费者态度的信息，因为汽油价格和运费成本在飙升，而中东冲突也在扩大。
items.title_en: ‘It’s all about oil’ as FedEx kicks off earnings this week
items.summary_en: With results due this week from FedEx and retail names like Lululemon and Macy’s, we’ll likely hear more about consumers’ attitudes, as gas prices and shipping costs spike and the conflict widens in the Middle East.
